attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for B-composition deviations in stream 4.

attributes.name: Stream 2 D-feed temperature disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for stream-2 D-feed temperature deviations.

attributes.name: Reactor cooling inlet temperature disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for reactor cooling-water inlet temperature faults.

attributes.name: Separator cooling inlet temperature disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for separator cooling-water inlet temperature faults.

attributes.name: Stream 1 A-feed loss disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for A-feed loss on stream 1.

attributes.name: Stream 4 C-header pressure disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for C-header pressure loss on stream 4.

attributes.name: Stream 4 A/B/C composition disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for random A/B/C composition deviations in stream 4.

attributes.name: Stream 4 feed temperature disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for stream-4 feed temperature deviations.

attributes.name: Reactor kinetics disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for reaction-kinetics drift inside the reactor.

attributes.name: Reactor coolant valve stiction
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for reactor coolant-valve stiction faults.

attributes.name: Separator coolant valve stiction
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for separator coolant-valve stiction faults.

attributes.name: Stripper heat-transfer disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for stripper-side heat-transfer deviations.

attributes.name: Reactor heat-transfer disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for reactor-side heat-transfer deviations.

attributes.name: Condenser heat-transfer disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical root-cause anchor for condenser and separator heat-transfer deviations.

attributes.name: Multi-valve stiction disturbance
attributes.summary: Canonical umbrella anchor for the ambiguous multi-valve stiction disturbance family.

policies: RCA Graph inherits the semantic lift backbone and adds SemanticConcept nodes without mutating the original Full KG entities.
REALIZES links evidence or implementation nodes to semantic concepts, while PART_OF anchors concepts onto RCA-relevant entities.
FaultAnchor nodes model canonical root-cause sources and connect to process entities only through propagating FAULT_SOURCE edges.
Curated propagation bridges restore downstream analyzer reachability where the prior graph omits outlet-stream-to-component carriers.
Live LLM curation is optional; rule-based candidate groups remain the deterministic fallback path.

attributes.head: BottleObject
attributes.evidence: Bottle example can contain scratch defect evidence

attributes.head: ScratchDefect
attributes.evidence: Scratch captions and elongated masks support linear morphology

attributes.head: ScratchDefect
attributes.evidence: Scratch is treated as a surface defect in the visual RCA reference layer

attributes.head: XMEAS1
attributes.evidence: XMEAS_1 is used as a reactor-related example variable

attributes.head: XMEAS1
attributes.evidence: Abnormal XMEAS_1 can indicate the example process fault

attributes.head: ProcessFault
attributes.evidence: The example process fault is associated with the reactor unit

attributes.head: ProcessFault
attributes.evidence: The example process fault may be explained by a feed flow disturbance

attributes.head: WaferObject
attributes.evidence: Wafer example contains nearfull defect evidence

attributes.head: NearfullDefect
attributes.evidence: Nearfull defects are represented with dense particle morphology in the example KG

attributes.head: NearfullDefect
attributes.evidence: Nearfull defect affects the wafer surface in the example case

attributes.head: NearfullDefect
attributes.evidence: Example alarm is associated with the nearfull wafer case

attributes.head: NearfullDefect
attributes.evidence: Insufficient glue removal may cause nearfull-like dense contamination

attributes.head: MetalNutObject
attributes.evidence: Metal nut scratch is selected as a development RCA case because linear surface marks are visually consistent with contact or handling damage

attributes.head: ScratchDefect
attributes.evidence: Scratch is a linear surface defect consistent with contact damage

attributes.head: MechanicalContact
attributes.evidence: Mechanical contact is grouped under handling-related damage

attributes.head: ScratchDefect
attributes.evidence: Repeated surface abrasion can produce shallow scratch-like marks

attributes.head: ColorDefect
attributes.evidence: Localized color change can indicate residue staining or foreign material on the surface

attributes.head: ColorDefect
attributes.evidence: Color variation can also reflect material or coating inconsistency

attributes.head: CableObject
attributes.evidence: Cable cut defects are selected as development RCA cases for mechanical or assembly-related damage

attributes.head: CutDefect
attributes.evidence: Cut-like cable damage is visually consistent with sharp contact or cutting damage

attributes.head: MissingWireDefect
attributes.evidence: Missing wire evidence maps to a missing component root-cause category

attributes.head: MissingWireDefect
attributes.evidence: Missing wire evidence can be explained by an assembly omission or placement error

attributes.head: BentWireDefect
attributes.evidence: Bent wire evidence can indicate assembly or routing error

attributes.head: BentWireDefect
attributes.evidence: Bent wire evidence can also indicate fixture or positioning misalignment

attributes.head: CrackDefect
attributes.evidence: Cracks can indicate brittle material or formation defects

attributes.head: CrackDefect
attributes.evidence: Cracks can also be consistent with compression during packaging or transport

attributes.head: ContaminationDefect
attributes.evidence: Visible contamination maps to a foreign material or residue source

attributes.head: SqueezeDefect
attributes.evidence: Squeeze-like deformation is consistent with compression or packaging pressure

attributes.head: SqueezeDefect
attributes.evidence: Squeeze-like deformation can also be caused by handling damage
